name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: catalog row for a single stamp or lot line.

entities.name: stamp
entities.brief: One inventory or catalog item for a stamp.
entities.description: Core record: country of issue, year, physical attributes (centering), condition, optional structured cancel or postmark when used, optional primary scott_catalog_entry (perforation and series context live on scott_catalog_entry when linked); additional catalog lines and thematic tags use child rows; optional pricing via listing.

field_definitions.name: stamp_cancel
field_definitions.description: Structured postal cancel or postmark read from the stamp or lot image.

composite.name: type
composite.description: Cancel or postmark class (e.g. circular datestamp, numeral killer, machine, slogan).

composite.name: city
composite.description: Town or post office name read from the cancel, when present.

composite.name: numeral
composite.description: Numeral or barred obliterator value from the cancel.

composite.name: date
composite.description: Date read from the cancel (ISO 8601 or partial text as transcribed).

fields.name: stamp_id
fields.description: Unique id (SKU, upload basename, or UUID).

fields.name: scott
fields.description: Optional primary catalog listing for this stamp (same composite key as scott_catalog_entry.scott). Cross-catalog lines remain on stamp_catalog_number.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Short title or working label (often aligned with listing title).

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Identification notes, variety callouts, or catalog commentary.

fields.name: issue_year
fields.description: Primary year of issue for this stamp or single-stamp lot.

fields.name: issue_year_to
fields.description: End year for multi-year issues or sets represented by one row.

fields.name: condition_quality
fields.description: Overall condition or gum state for mint/used grading.

fields.name: cancel
fields.description: Postmark or cancel detail when the item is used or the obliterator is salient.

fields.name: centering_grade
fields.description: Centering and margin balance for perforated issues, using the ladder common on eBay and in US expertizing (PSE, Philatelic Foundation): Gem/Superb through Fine/VF/XF slash grades (e.g. VF/XF, F-VF), then VG/Good/Average/Poor. MNH/NH/LH describe gum, not centering—use condition_quality for those.

fields.name: image_basename
fields.description: Image file name in uploads/ or media store.

fields.name: freeform_keywords
fields.description: Ad-hoc keywords not yet mapped to thematic_tag.
